name: DeepSeek (DeepSeek AI)
narrative: DeepSeek is a frontier AI lab founded by the Chinese quantitative hedge fund High-Flyer. It shocked the global AI industry by releasing models matching US frontier performance at a fraction of the compute cost, challenging assumptions about the compute-capability relationship. DeepSeek operates under Chinese regulatory constraints but has gained significant international attention and credibility. It reflects a technically aggressive, efficiency-focused lab navigating the tension between global scientific openness and Chinese state expectations.
